home.title: Mindfulness Supervisor
home.subtitle: Not a mindfulness teacher. A monitor that checks whether your practice is working for you — and suggests stopping or switching when it isn't.
watchItems: Treating the session as a performance
Continuing when it is making things worse
doesNotItems: No streaks. No scores. No achievements.
No promises about how you will feel.
No pushing you to meditate longer.
home.llmInactive: AI supervision: rule-based only — add OPENAI_API_KEY to .env.local
home.ttsInactive: Voice: text only — add ELEVENLABS_API_KEY to .env.local

checkin.moodLabel: How are you feeling right now?
checkin.tensionLabel: How much tension or pressure do you feel in your body or mind?
checkin.selfCriticalLabel: Are you being hard on yourself today?
checkin.intentLabel: What would feel most useful right now?
checkin.lastSessionLabel: How did your last session go?
checkin.freeTextLabel: Anything else on your mind right now?
checkin.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

guidance.audioUnavailable: Voice playback not configured. Read the text above.
guidance.audioError: Could not load audio. Read the text above.
guidance.worsePlaceholder: You can say anything, or just leave this blank.

post.pressureQuestion: Did the practice reduce pressure or add to it?
post.notesLabel: Anything to remember for next time?
post.submitError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

crisis.heading: If you need to talk to someone:
resources: Crisis Text Line: Text HOME to 741741
988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline: Call or text 988 (US)
crisis.notDesigned: This app is not designed for crisis situations. The people above are.
